examples: With a deft flick of his wrist, he extinguished the match.
He finished off the painting with a few deft strokes of the brush.
It was going to take some deft political footwork to save the situation.
He cut a deft figure on the podium, leading in lucid and propulsive style.
Robbie Keane's deft finish on 54 minutes eased Republic nerves before the contest petered out.
